sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 87

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Terminology 87:1
items.html:
(to the question) Itra de Gevura [crown of Gevura]
It is the five Gevurot belonging to the Nukva, which are the discernment of BON. (Item 76)
